entry.value: [["currentConversationId","pins","agentExecutionMode","isPanelCollapsed","displayedAnnouncements","conversations","onboarding","a|0|1|2|3|4|5|6","adb4b33d-22bb-4547-bbb0-c304923f18c5","o|","auto","b|F","Claude Fable 5 is now available — try it with /model","Access to Fable 5 has been removed following Anthropic’s announcement.
